title: Scythes Galore
description: Changes textures for every sword into new sharp scythes!
body: A brand new texture pack that aims to change and imrprove Minecraft's sword textures into new scythes! Changes the wooden, stone, iron, diamond, and netherite sword textures! More textures and improvements are to be added in future versions of the pack!![New Texture For The Diamond Sword!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a0903dbb8441d67ae102295f39dd69b82da23ed4.png)![Difference between the old texture and new texture!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d6ff1d8e10a08978ae0aa90226921f16edfbbfe4.png)
